_meta.source: Kalshi + Polymarket via squawka.com tracker, read from page text (NOT LLM-extracted)
_meta.note: Champion implied probabilities. Market is unusually FLAT at top: Spain/France co-favorites, England clear 3rd, then a tight cluster. Diverges from Opta (which is more concentrated and rates Argentina/Germany higher, Portugal lower).

_modeling_note: Use Elo as primary match-strength anchor. Use these champion probs to (a) calibrate sim top-end and (b) build the FIELD model (rival pick distribution). Field over-weights big names vs pure market; blend Opta+market+name-bias for field-share.
